answers: Veganism is a lifestyle that avoids all animal products — in food, clothing, and other areas — primarily for ethical, environmental, or health reasons.
Veganism holo kono animal product na khawa ba use na kora. Meat, dairy, egg, leather, wool — kichu na. Ethics, environment, ba health er jonno manush vegan hoy.

Ethical veganism argues that animals shouldn't suffer for human consumption. The environmental case is also strong — animal agriculture is a leading cause of deforestation and greenhouse gas emissions.
A well-planned vegan diet can be very healthy, providing all necessary nutrients. However, vegans need to be mindful of B12, iron, omega-3s, and protein from varied plant sources.
